notify.reconnected: Reconnected to server, reloading in {n} second(s)…

missingStreamers.title: Missing Streamers Found
missingStreamers.message:
The following streamer accounts do not exist and will be removed

{list}

missingPpResults.title: Orphaned Post-processing Records Found
missingPpResults.message:
The following files no longer exist but still have post-processing records and will be cleaned up

{list}

remove.title: Remove Streamer
remove.message: Are you sure you want to remove {username}? Related recording files will also be deleted.

stop.title: Stop Recording
stop.message: Are you sure you want to stop recording {username}?

streamerCard.streamUrlHint: Open this URL directly in any player to watch

addStreamer.title: Add Streamer
addStreamer.description: Enter a Stripchat username or URL to add a streamer to the tracking list
addStreamer.label: Stripchat username or URL

delete.title: Delete Recording
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This cannot be undone.
delete.batchMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected file(s)? This cannot be undone.

postprocess.title: Post-processing Pipeline
postprocess.description: After recording is merged, the video file will be processed by the following modules in order
postprocess.empty: No post-processing nodes yet, click below to add

picker.title: Select Module
picker.description: Select a module from the available list to add to the pipeline
picker.noModulesHint: Place module executables in the modules/ folder in the app directory

postprocess.updatedByOther: Post-processing pipeline updated by another client

finder.title: Streamer Finder
finder.description: Find streamers via camgirlfinder.net with face recognition and name search

face.dropzone: Click to select an image, or drag & drop / paste here
face.dropzoneHint: Max 10MB, supports JPG / PNG / WebP etc.
face.timeout: Search timed out, please try again
face.noFace: No face detected in the image, please try another

name.noResults: No streamers found, try different keywords

dialog.title: Streamers similar to "{name}"
dialog.description: Find streamers similar to this one using face recognition
dialog.noFace: Could not detect a face from this streamer's image

settings.title: Settings
settings.mouflonUpdatedByOther: Mouflon Keys updated by another client

outputDir.label: Output Directory
outputDir.hint: Press Enter or click elsewhere to confirm
outputDir.changeDone: Output directory updated, will take effect on next recording

mergeFormat.label: Merge Format
mergeFormat.hint: Format for automatically merging segments after recording ends. Changes apply to recordings already in progress.

maxTmpDirGb.label: Max Tmp Directory Size (GB)
maxTmpDirGb.hint: Size limit for temporary files created by post-processing modules. Oldest files are deleted when the limit is exceeded. 0 means unlimited. Default: 50 GB.

apiProxy.label: API Proxy (for stripchat.com, leave empty to disable)
apiProxy.hint: Press Enter or click elsewhere to confirm

scMirror.label: Stripchat Mirror (replaces stripchat.com in API, leave empty to disable)
scMirror.hint: When both API proxy and mirror are set, the mirror will be accessed via the proxy

cdnProxy.label: CDN Proxy (for downloading HLS segments, leave empty to disable)
cdnProxy.hint: Press Enter or click elsewhere to confirm

settings.mouflonKeysDesc: Stripchat encrypts HLS segment filenames (Mouflon system). Enter the corresponding pkey → pdkey pairs here before recording. Keys can be obtained from community channels.

keyError.empty: Both pkey and pdkey are required

relay.title: Relay Streams
relay.subtitle: {streams} stream(s), {connections} active connection(s)
relay.hint: Open the URL below directly in any player — no manual setup needed. Connects to upstream automatically on first access. Streamers not in the recording list can be relayed too.
relay.noSessionsHint: Open /stream/{modelname} in a player to auto-start
relay.desktopUnsupported: Relay streams are only available in Server mode

setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.subtitle: Complete the following configuration before getting started. You can change these settings anytime in the Settings page.
setup.outputDirRequired: Please enter a recording output directory

step2.title: Recording Output Directory
step2.desc: Recordings will be saved to this directory. Make sure there is enough disk space.
step2.hint: Enter an absolute path on the server, e.g. /data/recordings or D:\recordings

step3.title: Network Proxies (Optional)
step3.desc: Configure proxies if the server cannot access Stripchat directly. You can skip this step if not needed.
